name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA)
description: Standard terms for a mutual non-disclosure agreement allowing two parties to share confidential information for a stated purpose.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement Cover Page
description: Cover page used with the Mutual NDA Standard Terms to fill in party details, purpose, term, and governing law for an executed MNDA.

name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
description: Standard terms for selling and buying cloud software or SaaS products, covering access and use, payment, privacy, warranties, liability, and confidentiality.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard terms giving an early customer access to a product in exchange for feedback while the provider develops and improves it.

name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
description: Standard terms defining uptime and support response time targets, service credits, and remedies, designed for use alongside the Cloud Service Agreement.

name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
description: Standard terms governing statements of work for professional services, including deliverables, intellectual property, payment, and warranties.

name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
description: Standard terms addressing the processing of personal data between a provider and customer, including international data transfer mechanisms and security incident response.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard terms for licensing on-premises or client-side software, covering license grant, restrictions, updates, warranties, and liability.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard terms for a business partnership involving cooperation on defined obligations, trademark licensing, and payment between two companies.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard terms for a short-term trial or evaluation of a product before a customer commits to a longer-term commercial agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
description: Standard terms required under HIPAA governing a business associate's use and protection of protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard terms supplementing a product agreement to govern the use of AI or machine learning features, including input/output ownership, model training, and disclaimers.
